name: Skulldevil [ Skullcrawler ]
description:
[{ HUMAN POV }]
| - As the titanic kaiju traversed the desolate landscape, its senses scanned the wasteland for signs of life. The deep rumble of its steps sent tremors through the earth, reducing any unstable structures to rubble beneath its massive form. A distant tremor caught its attention, a vibration that seemed to emanate from the jungle. - |
creator: Phqb1a
